measured.note: At mobile breakpoint, account-shell uses 24px padding — on-grid.

measured.element: list card separator (space-y-3 active at < md breakpoint)
measured.note: space-y-3 = 12px — correctly on the 4px grid at mobile. Violation only exists at md+ (768px+).

note: All spacing grid-compliant at mobile viewport. The space-y-2.5 off-grid violation is masked at mobile because space-y-3 takes precedence below the md breakpoint.
